description: Exclude control-vs-treatment FP regression: two dirs trip the same rule; treatment excludes it by name (QD-1699) and path-scoped under excluded/ (QD-1473). Rule id resolved from the control run.

expectations.reason: STARTING-GUESS id: control run must find the planted rule under planted/; this match supplies the id reused by the treatment absent-checks.
STARTING-GUESS id: control run must also find the SAME rule under excluded/, proving the path-scoped exclude (not the absence of a defect) is what removes it in treatment.
Exclude-by-name must remove the rule project-wide, including under planted/ (QD-1699). Id resolved from the control variant's planted/ match.
Path-scoped exclude must remove findings under excluded/ (QD-1473). Id resolved from the control variant's excluded/ match.
